answer_en:
Platysma m.
Origin: Subcutaneous tissue of infraclavicular and supraclavicular regions
Insertion: Base of mandible, skin of cheek and lower lip, angle of mouth (modiolus) and orbicularis oris m.

details: Origin: Subcutaneous tissue of infraclavicular and supraclavicular regions
Insertion: Base of mandible, skin of cheek and lower lip, angle of mouth (modiolus) and orbicularis oris m.
